channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: NFL free agency: Top quarterbacks available from starters to bridge options
item.description: The 2025 NFL free agency market has the potential to offer quarterback-needy teams some viable options ahead of the draft in April.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Championship bound! Acalanes girls dice up Cardinal Newman in NCS Open semifinal
item.description: NCS Open Division girls basketball playoffs: K.K. Lacanlale scored 13 points and dished out 10 assists as Acalanes cruised past Cardinal Newman.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: No. 2 Pinewood powers past No. 3 Priory in CCS Open semis, setting up titanic title game against No. 1 Mitty
item.description: Thanks to a big third-quarter surge, Pinewood punched its ticket to the CCS Open Division championship game against Archbishop Mitty, the best girls basketball team in the Bay Area
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: BYU drains 17 three-pointers in 91-81 win over ASU
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - Richie Saunders scored 26 points, Trevin Knell added 18 and No. 25 BYU beat short-handed Arizona State 91-81 on Wednesday night to extend its winning streak to five games.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Japan beats United States 2-1 for SheBelieves Cup women's soccer title
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Toko Koga scored early in the second half and Japan handed the United States its first loss under coach Emma Hayes with a 2-1 victory Wednesday night in the SheBelieves Cup title game.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Bay Area high school basketball: Wednesday’s semifinal results, updated schedule
item.description: Scores from Wednesday night's Central Coast Section, North Coast Section boys, girls basketball playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Darren Sabedra, The Mercury News

item.title: Defensive end Abdul Carter says he's the best player in NFL 2025 draft class
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Former Penn State star Abdul Carter made one thing clear Wednesday: He should be the No. 1 overall pick in this year's NFL draft.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: GJ Girls Basketball wins opening playoff game, set for battle with #1 seed
item.description: In the first-ever playoff basketball game played at Grand Junction's brand-new gym, the Tigers came out on top.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Tre Holloman's midcourt buzzer-beater could propel Michigan State to a Big Ten title
item.description: COLLEGE PARK, Md. (AP) — Tre Holloman hadn't even reached the “M” logo at midcourt when he jumped off one foot and let the ball fly. Somehow, it stayed on line before dropping through the hoop with a swish that reverberated across the Big Ten.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Holloman from halfcourt! Buzzer-beater gives No. 8 Michigan State a 58-55 win over No. 16 Maryland
item.description: COLLEGE PARK, Md. (AP) — Tre Holloman made a buzzer-beater from beyond midcourt to give No. 8 Michigan State a 58-55 win over No. 16 Maryland in a sensational finish Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Riley Gaines sends warning to Democrats, NCAA during national battle over trans athletes in women's sports
item.description: Former NCAA swimmer and OutKick host Riley Gaines warned Democrats and the NCAA Wednesday about multiple conflicts involving transgender athletes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL reviewing possible changes to overtime rules. First downs to be measured electronically
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — The NFL is considering changing overtime rules in the regular season to decrease the advantage for teams that win the coin toss. “It’s time to rethink the overtime rule,” league executive Troy Vincent said Wednesday at the NFL scouting combine.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Liverpool increases lead atop Premier League as Arsenal drops more points
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — It feels like a matter of when, not if, Liverpool seals a record-equaling 20th English league title. The gap at the top of the Premier League was extended to 13 points on Wednesday after a 2-0 victory over Newcastle.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sen Tommy Tuberville calls Maine gov a 'total a--' for defying Trump on trans athletes
item.description: Sen. Tommy Tuberville, R-Ala., called out Maine Gov. Janet Mills over her recent feud with President Donald Trump and her refusal to ban trans athletes from girls' sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Diana Taurasi of the Phoenix Mercury retires after 20 WNBA seasons, 3 titles and 6 Olympic golds
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Diana Taurasi is retiring after 20 seasons, ending one of the greatest careers in women's basketball history. The WNBA's career scoring leader and a three-time league champion, Taurasi announced her retirement on Tuesday in an interview with Time magazine.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL and DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lando Norris is fastest and Lewis Hamilton 13th as a power cut disrupts F1 testing
item.description: SAKHIR, Bahrain (AP) — Lando Norris was fastest and seven-time champion Lewis Hamilton 13th as Formula 1 teams had to deal with a power outage that disrupted preseason testing Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Wrestling at Frontwave Arena: a preview with Thunder Rosa
item.description: All Elite Wrestling (AEW) is set to bring an action-packed night to Oceanside's Frontwave Arena on Wednesday, with stars like Thunder Rosa, a trailblazer in women's wrestling, ready to take center stage.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Auriemma and Martelli headline Joe Lapchick Character Award recipients
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Geno Auriemma and Phil Martelli headline this year's recipients of the Joe Lapchick Character Award. Joining the two coaches will be longtime men's basketball official Gene Steratore and former Fordham athletic director Frank McLaughlin.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lionel Messi strikes early, Inter Miami beats Sporting KC 3-1 to advance in Champions Cup
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — Lionel Messi opened the scoring with a masterful strike in the 19th minute, and Inter Miami beat Sporting Kansas City 3-1 on Tuesday night in the second leg of the CONCACAF Champions Cup’s first round.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah's comeback effort falls short at UCF, 76-72
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (ABC4 Sports) - Darius Johnson scored a reverse layup with 2.5 seconds left to give UCF the lead and Keyshawn Hall added two free throws after a turnover as the Knights knocked off Utah, 76-72 Sunday to snap a seven-game losing streak and earn their first win in a month.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Luxury portable toilets sought after ahead of NFL draft
item.description: The luxury restroom trailers and containers feature flushing toilets, sinks, air conditioning, and even stereo systems.
item.dc:creator: Timothy Littau, NewsNation

item.title: Mikaela Shiffrin gets historic 100th World Cup race win and ties record for most podiums
item.description: Shiffrin’s record-extending 100th career World Cup race win Sunday fulfilled a quest put on hold by a serious crash in November.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Keyonte George scores 30 in Jazz win over Rockets
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Keyonte George scored 30 points and Lauri Markkanen added 23 points and 10 rebounds to rally the Utah Jazz to a 124-115 victory over the Houston Rockets on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lakers snap Nuggets' 9-game winning streak behind Luka Doncic's best game yet for LA
item.description: Luka Doncic scored 32 points in his best game by far with the Lakers, leading Los Angeles to a 123-100 runaway win at Denver on Saturday night that snapped the Nuggets' nine-game winning streak.
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Booker, Durant and Beal help the Suns beat the Bulls to snap a 4-game losing streak
item.description: Devin Booker had 29 points and eight assists, Kevin Durant scored 27 points and Bradley Beal had 25 in his return to the starting lineup to help the Phoenix Suns beat the Chicago Bulls 121-117 on Saturday to end a four-game losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Red Rocks clinch Big 12 regular season title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The University of Utah claimed the Big 12 Conference’s first gymnastics regular-season title. The Red Rocks earned the title Friday after a 198.075-197.525 victory against Denver to go 6-0 during league play.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: One-armed basketball player makes history with basket
item.description: When her high school basketball coach cut her from the team senior year, Baileigh Sinaman-Daniel refused to let that rejection, or the fact she was born with one arm, end her dream.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Towns, Brunson help Knicks edge Bulls 113-111 in OT
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Karl-Anthony Towns had 32 points and 18 rebounds, Jalen Brunson added 22 points and 12 assists and the New York Knicks edged the Chicago Bulls 113-111 in overtime Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Robot umpires are getting their first MLB test during spring training
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — A computerized system that calls balls and strikes is being tested during Major League Baseball spring training exhibition games starting Thursday after four years of experiments in the minor leagues.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, WGN 9
